case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JIANYU GU ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GU, JIANYU
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS ENDORSED COPY RETURNED IN SASE.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAY-11-2016, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GU, JIANYU THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 801 HOWARD STREET, #432, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT.
